description_long: This is a rectangular wooden dining table accompanied by four matching wooden chairs, all finished in a light, natural wood tone. The table features a flat, smooth top with straight, sturdy legs at each corner, providing a stable base. Each chair has a slatted backrest and a flat seat, with simple, angular construction that matches the table's minimalist design. The set is unadorned, with no visible decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and clean lines. The wood grain is subtly visible across all surfaces, giving the set a warm and inviting appearance. This ensemble is suitable for communal dining or gathering spaces, blending seamlessly into both modern and traditional urban environments.
description: A light wood rectangular dining table with four matching slatted-back chairs, featuring a minimalist and functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the table with two chairs facing forward and two chairs behind, highlighting the slatted backs and sturdy legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the table and all four chairs, emphasizing the rectangular shape and uniform chair design.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with two chairs in the foreground and two in the background, showing the backrest slats clearly.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing the table's length and the arrangement of all four chairs.
